title: Iran Begins Lifting Monthslong Internet Blackout, Officials Say
summary_full: Organizations that track online traffic confirmed an uptick in activity on Tuesday, as Iranians reconnected to the global internet after a government-imposed shutdown.
summary_public: Organizations that track online traffic confirmed an uptick in activity on Tuesday, as Iranians reconnected to the global internet after a government-imposed shutdown.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran Begins Lifting Monthslong Internet Blackout
